title: Abek's Station
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Abeksstation.jpg|thumb|A ship docks at Abek's Station]]
'''Abek's Station''' was a [[Shadowport/Legends|Shadowport]] owned by the [[Nikto/Legends|Nikto]] pirate [[Nim Abek]]. It resided on the [[Sisar Run/Legends|Sisar Run]] just before the [[Ac'fren Spur]], though it could not be found on any maps. The only method of finding it was by invitation. The [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Near-Human]] [[Blalock]] was in charge of security on the shadowport.

The station was [[Destruction of Abek's Station|destroyed]] in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]] by [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Surlev]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

==Layout==
*Level 1: "The Pit"/Engineering (lowest level)
**Contained the life support systems, gravity generators, storage, power & refueling cells, and the station's reactor

*Level 2: Spaceport/Accommodations
**Contained rooms for Nim Abek's clients along with his bar, [[The Thirsty Monoc]]

*Level 3: Docking Bay
**Contained docking facilities for Abek's customers

*Level 4: The Arena
**Contained facilities for gladiatorial combat, Nim Abek's favorite form of entertainment, as well as an animal pen for Abek's [[Oskan blood eater]]

*Level 5: Abek's Dock
**Contained docking facility for Abek and his men

*Level 6: The Pirate's Quarters
**Contained a private lounge, a kitchen, and private quarters for Abek's men

*Level 7: The Chop Shop
**Contained docking facilities for stolen ships awaiting maintenance

*Level 8: Abek's Quarters
[[File:Abeklagainsecrets.jpg|thumb|left|A freighter flees Abek's Station]]
